title: Consistent Avatar Emotion Grid AI
sourceTitle: Consistent Avatar Emotion Grid AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Clean modern emotion-grid layout showing same expressive 3D avatar character repeated consistently in every tile across a complete expression set. Subject: same expressive 3D avatar character repeated consistently in every tile stays consistent in identity, proportions, outfit logic, and render style while changing facial expression, pose, and gesture for Joyful yellow, Shocked blue, Stern red, Bashful pink, Confident green, Worried violet, Sleepy gray. Scene: Each tile uses a clean gradient or solid color background tied to its emotion, separated by thin white gaps and a subtle outer border. Composition: Fixed grid composition with slight rounded corners on every tile, equal panel spacing, modern UI aesthetic, and enough character scale for expression readability. Signature Elements: Pose, gesture, or foreground action: large readable hand gestures, clear eyebrows, mouth shape, and head tilt for each emotion. Preserved consistent avatar emotion grid source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Polished 3D/avatar character expression sheet with clean shapes, friendly commercial UI finish, crisp lighting, readable silhouette, and consistent model identity across all panels. Color Palette: Joy/emotion-coded tile colors such as yellow, blue, red, pink, purple, green, gray, orange, teal, and slate, balanced by white grid gaps and clean borders. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Consistent Avatar Emotion Grid Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Clean modern emotion-grid layout showing same cute mascot designer character with matching hair, outfit, and proportions in every panel across a complete expression set. Subject: same cute mascot designer character with matching hair, outfit, and proportions in every panel stays consistent in identity, proportions, outfit logic, and render style while changing facial expression, pose, and gesture for Laughing gold, Amazed cyan, Determined red, Nervous lavender, Proud emerald, Calm cream, Angry orange, Curious teal, Tired slate. Scene: Each tile uses a clean gradient or solid color background tied to its emotion, separated by thin white gaps and a subtle outer border. Composition: Fixed grid composition with slight rounded corners on every tile, equal panel spacing, modern UI aesthetic, and enough character scale for expression readability. Signature Elements: Pose, gesture, or foreground action: full upper-body poses, exaggerated eyes, brows, hands, and mouth silhouettes. Preserved consistent avatar emotion grid source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Polished 3D/avatar character expression sheet with clean shapes, friendly commercial UI finish, crisp lighting, readable silhouette, and consistent model identity across all panels. Color Palette: Joy/emotion-coded tile colors such as yellow, blue, red, pink, purple, green, gray, orange, teal, and slate, balanced by white grid gaps and clean borders. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
